title: Deawy's Fresher Bricks
description: This pack overhauls the bricks to make them feel more fresh.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e76d11e7fa839238d266fde26ea06513b4b19d0.png)This pack overhauls the bricks to make them feel more fresh.
This pack Overhauls:
- Stone Bricks
- Moss Stone Bricks
- Cracked Stone Bricks
- All Variants (stairs, slabs, walls, ect)

![Build with Pack on.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60ffbc53b1d5ed527e29c8b835a93eb98234d04_0.webp)
